hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/update_resources/connectors
# OK 1: This will add higherClassification in taxon.tab. And rebuild the DwCA. # globi_assoc has parentNameUsageID field but doesn't have any values, it's blank. So we use ancestry to compute for hC # source is: globi_assoc.tar.gz php dwca_utility.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc", "task": "gen_hC_using_ancestry"}' # generates FILENAME-with-hC.tar.gz
# OK 2: This use gnparser one name at a time. Not entire file. php run_gnparser_dwca.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc-with-hC"}' #OK gen neo4j_1
# OK 3: Start matching taxa: php match_taxa_2DH.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc-with-hC_neo4j_1", "AncestryIndexVer": "new"}' #OK gen +_eolID
# OK 4: Convert taxon.tab, use EOLid value for taxonID. # REMINDER: Multiple scinames with different taxonIDs may have the same canonical thus will have the same EOLid # Reminder: All taxonID is now EOLid. Images from Media tab now excluded. php use_EOLid_as_taxonID.php _ '{"resource_id": "globi_assoc-with-hC_neo4j_1_eolID"}' # gen globi_assoc_final # generates globi_assoc_final.tar.gz
# rename cd /var/www/html/eol_php8_code/applications/content_server/resources_3 cp globi_assoc_final.tar.gz GloBI_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz ls -lt globi_assoc_final.tar.gz ls -lt GloBI_TraitBank_1_0.tar.gz rm -f globi_assoc_final.tar.gz
